plugins.name: ask-framework
plugins.description: ASK (Agent Security Framework) compliance reviewer and design assistant — ASK 2026.03. Reviews code, specs, and architectures against 24 ASK tenets, analyzes XPIA kill chain posture, verifies cognitive model separation (Constraints/Session/Identity), evaluates trust spectrum positioning, and generates ASK-compliant configurations for Mind, Gateway, Egress, and Enforcer components.
